# story_api.d

```ts
import { MessageFns } from "../../baseType";
import { CreatePostResult, PostPicture, PostPictureInQuery, PostServiceCommonCode } from "./post_api";
import { UserInfo } from "./user_api";
export declare const protobufPackage = "PostServiceStoryProto";
export interface Story {
    /** 故事id */
    id?: number | undefined;
    /** 创建时间 */
    createdAt?: number | undefined;
    /** 更新时间 */
    updatedAt?: number | undefined;
    /** 删除时间 */
    deletedAt?: number | undefined;
    /** 发布者 user */
    fromUser?: UserInfo | undefined;
    /** 关联者 user */
    toUser?: UserInfo | undefined;
    fromUserId?: number | undefined;
    toUserId?: number | undefined;
    /** 复用PostPictureInQuery结构体，二者暂时保持一致 */
    pictures?: PostPictureInQuery[] | undefined;
    /** 故事标题文案 */
    title?: string | undefined;
    /** 故事内容文案 */
    content?: string | undefined;
    /** 是否已经祝福 */
    isBless?: boolean | undefined;
    /** 祝福数量 */
    blessCount?: number | undefined;
}
/** 爱情故事祝福 */
export interface StoryBless {
    /** id */
    id?: number | undefined;
    /** 关联的爱情故事id */
    storyId?: number | undefined;
    /** 创建时间 */
    createdAt?: number | undefined;
    /** 更新时间 */
    updatedAt?: number | undefined;
    /** 删除时间 */
    deletedAt?: number | undefined;
    /** 发布者user_id */
    userId?: number | undefined;
    /** 发布者 user */
    user?: UserInfo | undefined;
    /** 祝福文案内容 */
    content?: string | undefined;
}
/** AdminCreateStoryRequest 后台创建爱情故事 */
export interface AdminCreateStoryRequest {
    fromUserId?: number | undefined;
    toUserId?: number | undefined;
    title?: string | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
    createdAt?: number | undefined;
    pictures?: PostPicture[] | undefined;
    picturesInQuery?: PostPictureInQuery[] | undefined;
}
export interface AdminCreateStoryResponse {
    code?: CreatePostResult | undefined;
    /** if fail */
    message?: string | undefined;
    story?: Story | undefined;
}
/** AdminEditStoryRequest 后台编辑爱情故事 */
export interface AdminEditStoryRequest {
    storyId?: number | undefined;
    fromUserId?: number | undefined;
    toUserId?: number | undefined;
    title?: string | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
    createdAt?: number | undefined;
    pictures?: PostPicture[] | undefined;
    picturesInQuery?: PostPictureInQuery[] | undefined;
}
export interface AdminEditStoryResponse {
    code?: CreatePostResult | undefined;
    /** if fail */
    message?: string | undefined;
    story?: Story | undefined;
}
/** AdminDeleteStoryRequest 后台删除爱情故事 */
export interface AdminDeleteStoryRequest {
    storyIds?: number[] | undefined;
}
export interface AdminDeleteStoryResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
}
/** AdminGetStoryListRequest 后台分页获取爱情列表 */
export interface AdminGetStoryListRequest {
    offset?: number | undefined;
    limit?: number | undefined;
}
export interface AdminGetStoryListResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
    storyList?: Story[] | undefined;
    nextOffset?: number | undefined;
}
/** GetStoryFeed 获取爱情故事列表 */
export interface GetStoryFeedRequest {
    limit?: number | undefined;
    offset?: number | undefined;
}
export interface GetStoryFeedResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
    storyList?: Story[] | undefined;
    nextOffset?: number | undefined;
}
/** GetStoryBanner 获取爱情故事轮播内容 */
export interface GetStoryBannerRequest {
}
export interface GetStoryBannerResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
    storyList?: Story[] | undefined;
}
/** GetStoryById 根据ID获取爱情故事详情 */
export interface GetStoryByIdRequest {
    storyId?: number | undefined;
}
export interface GetStoryByIdResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
    story?: Story | undefined;
}
/** GetMyStoryFeed 获取我的爱情故事列表（因为无针内容，该接口返回为空） */
export interface GetMyStoryFeedRequest {
    limit?: number | undefined;
    offset?: number | undefined;
}
export interface GetMyStoryFeedResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
    storyList?: Story[] | undefined;
    nextOffset?: number | undefined;
}
/** GetRandStoryBlessText 获取随机的祝福文案 */
export interface GetRandStoryBlessTextRequest {
}
export interface GetRandStoryBlessTextResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    message?: string | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
}
/** CreateStoryBless 创建故事祝福 */
export interface CreateStoryBlessRequest {
    storyId?: number | undefined;
    content?: string | undefined;
}
export interface CreateStoryBlessResponse {
    code?: PostServiceCommonCode | undefined;
    /** if fail */
    message?: string | undefined;
    storyBlessId?: number | undefined;
    storyBless?: StoryBless | undefined;
}
/** GetStoryBlessFeed 获取故事祝福列表 */
export interface GetStoryBlessFeedRequest {
    storyId?: number | undefined;
    offset?: number | undefined;
    limit?: number | undefined;
}

    storyBlessCount?: number | undefined;
    nextOffset?: number | undefined;
}
```
